episode.title: Koko and Gugu 🦉 The Starry Night | English Bedtime Story | Koko's Forest Adventure
episode.description:
EP004 - The Starry Night
叩叩的森林冒險

In this episode, Koko the squirrel gets lost in the dark forest and worries she chose the wrong path. The wise owl Gugu teaches her a valuable lesson: when you feel confused, stop, look up at the stars, and listen to the sounds around you. The answers are already inside of you!

🌙 VOCABULARY / 單字
⭐ Star (星星)
🦉 Wise (有智慧)
👂 Listen (聽)

💡 MORAL LESSON
When you feel confused or scared, remember: stop running, look up, and listen to the world around you. The answers are already inside of you.

📺 SERIES INFORMATION
"Koko's Forest Adventure" is a bilingual English learning series for children aged 3-8. Each episode features a gentle bedtime story designed to:
✓ Build English vocabulary naturally
✓ Teach important life lessons through storytelling
✓ Provide calming, sleep-friendly narration
✓ Include both English and Traditional Chinese

🎯 EPISODE THEMES
- Wisdom & Learning to Listen
- Overcoming Confusion & Fear
- Trust in Nature & Guidance

🎵 AUDIO
Narrated by professional bilingual narrators in English and Mandarin Chinese. Perfect for bedtime, quiet time, or English language learning.

📚 CHARACTERS
- Koko: A brave little squirrel discovering the forest
- Gugu: A wise, gentle owl who shares forest wisdom

✨ CHAPTERS
0:00 Koko Gets Lost
2:30 Gugu Appears
5:15 The Stars Teach
8:45 Listen to the Forest
12:00 Koko Finds Home
15:30 Word Time (Vocabulary)
18:00 Goodnight Message

🔔 SUBSCRIBE for more bedtime stories, English learning, and forest adventures!
